# /clarify

> Plan-approval gate. Resolves Open Items, fills `<TBD>` markers, ensures every L4 carries a valid F&O object-id prefix.

## Usage

```
/clarify [--approve] [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/plan.md`
- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/spec.md` (Open Items roll-up)
- [templates/checklists/plan-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/plan-review.checklist.md)

## Execution flow

1. Run `doc_lint` on plan.md.
2. Evaluate each checklist category:
   - L1-L4 completeness — every L3 has at least one L4 placeholder; every L4 fits 3-8h window
   - Object-id prefixes — every L4 carries EXT/BDC/OPR/INT/DEN/SEC/WFL
   - Open Items resolved or deferred with rationale
   - NFR coverage per FR
   - Cross-agent dependencies tracked in handoffs
3. Write `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/reviews/plan-review.md`.
4. On `--approve`: zero BLOCKERs + REQUIREDs accepted → flip `gates.PLAN_CLARIFIED.status=APPROVED`; unlocks `/task`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-fo/features/{f}/reviews/plan-review.md`
- `.workflow.json` updated

## See also

- [ADR-0001](../../../design/adr/0001-review-scope-spec-only.md)
